author: Chris Basham
description: Implicitly add an alias matching the first heading in a document.

manifest.author: Chris Basham
manifest.description: Implicitly add an alias matching the first heading in a document.
manifest.name: Alias from heading

name: Alias from heading

releases.author: basham
releases.description: Fix: Plugin should not error when `getCache()` returns null (#14, #15).

releases.author: basham
releases.description: Fix: Commas in headings should not split the implicit alias into multiple implicit aliases.

releases.author: basham
releases.description:
- Feature: Heading aliases now are included wherever YAML aliases are used (#5, #12).
- Feature: Links formatted as Markdown links now update when their heading aliases change (#11).
- Fix: Links should update even when there are anchor links (#10)
- Fix: Update notes with `vault.process()` to avoid unintentional loss of data.

releases.author: basham
releases.description:
- Fix: Update links regardless of link format (shortest, absolute, relative) (#8, #9).
- Update dev dependencies.

releases.author: basham
releases.description: - Fix: Plugin should load even if there are no notes in the vault (#7).

releases.author: basham
releases.description:
- Fix: Use the standard way of unregistering events on plugin unload.
- Fix: Extend the standard way of adding link suggestions, rather than modifying Obsidian cache internals.
- Broken: In making the previous fix, heading aliases are no longer included in the [Quick Switcher](https://help.obsidian.md/Plugins/Quick+switcher).

releases.author: basham
releases.description: - Fix: Remove potential conflict with other plugins or Obsidian, due to extending cached metadata.

releases.author: basham
releases.description:
- Fix: Load heading aliases on plugin load, not just when the vault opens.
- Fix: Restore any modified Obsidian caches to their original state when the plugin unloads.
- Fix: Stop the plugin from working when the plugin unloads.
- Fix: Be more compatible with different ways aliases can be defined in YAML.
- Fix: Clarified plugin behavior in the readme.
- Should resolve issues identified in #2.

releases.author: basham
releases.description: - Fix: Update metadata cache on load, so link suggestions are accurate.

releases.author: basham
releases.description:
- Fix: Ensure the workspace is ready before prepping the plugin.
- Fix: Accurately update links when the heading ends with `]`.
- Fix: Accurately update links when the heading includes [string replacement patterns](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/String/replace#specifying_a_string_as_a_parameter), such as `$$` and `$&`.

releases.author: basham
releases.description: - Fix: Do not load heading from cache when a file is renamed.

releases.author: basham
releases.description: - Fix: After the file is renamed, updating the heading should also update links.

releases.author: basham
releases.description: - Fix: Automatically clear out old data, to reduce memory impact.

releases.author: basham
releases.description:
- Update readme and plugin description.
- Fix: Cache the headings of only active and open files, not all in the vault.
- Fix: Do not update links in the format of `[[path]]`.
- Fix: Work with links in the format of `[[path#heading|name]]` and `[[path#^block|name]]`.

releases.author: basham
releases.description:
- Fix: Works now when the plugin loads, instead of just when the vault opens.
- Fix: Works now when files are renamed.

releases.author: basham
releases.description: - Fix: Updates links on files linking to the file being changed.
